title: Genomics Upload Detail
description: View the processing status and annotation results for an uploaded VCF or genomics file. Review variant calling statistics, annotation completeness, quality metrics, and linked OMOP concept mappings.
tips: The processing pipeline annotates variants with HGVS notation, gene symbols, functional impact, and clinical significance.
Quality metrics include Ti/Tv ratio, pass filter rate, and coverage depth — values outside expected ranges may indicate sequencing artifacts.
Annotation coverage shows the percentage of variants successfully mapped to ClinVar, dbSNP, and OncoKB.
Use the OMOP tab to review how somatic variants are mapped to OMOP Measurement and Observation concept IDs.
Failed uploads show an error log with specific reasons — common issues include non-standard contig names or VCF format violations.
